short_text: Marco Jansen to Theekshana, N Thushara Run Out!! 1 run completed. A run-out at the bowler's end and . Short of a good le
full_text: Marco Jansen to Theekshana, N Thushara Run Out!! 1 run completed. A run-out at the bowler's end and . Short of a good length and just outside off, hit high on the bat as Theekshana slogged, lobbed over mid-off and there was never a second, but Theekshana wanted the strike and they took the risk, Nortje's throw is accurate and Jansen does the rest, finding Thushara well short.

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, driven down to long-on for a single, Theekshana wi
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, driven down to long-on for a single, Theekshana will keep strike for the final over

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, banged in short by Baartman, this was the effort ball - Theekshana makes room on the swing and misses

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, , , Theekshana finally connects with one, back of a length and at the stumps, no real pa
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, , , Theekshana finally connects with one, back of a length and at the stumps, no real pace and it's thwacked past mid-wicket for a boundary

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, short of a good length and holding its line outside off, Theekshana backs away o
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, short of a good length and holding its line outside off, Theekshana backs away on the slog and misses

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, a mix-up and both batters get back to their original positions - short of a good length and at the pads, flicked past square leg and Theekshana took a couple of steps, Thushara responded and was right beside him when he's sent back

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, fuller length delivery and holding its line outside off, Theekshana swings wildl
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, fuller length delivery and holding its line outside off, Theekshana swings wildly and misses

short_text: Rabada to N Thushara, no run, on a good length and following Thushara as he made room, clipped the thigh-pad and rolled
full_text: Rabada to N Thushara, no run, on a good length and following Thushara as he made room, clipped the thigh-pad and rolled to the off-side

short_text: Rabada to N Thushara, no run, a case of ball hitting bat once again, express pace from Rabada as Thushara backed away, t
full_text: Rabada to N Thushara, no run, a case of ball hitting bat once again, express pace from Rabada as Thushara backed away, the ball rolls to the off-side

full_text: Rabada to N Thushara, no run, on a length and at the stumps, Thushara backs away, the ball hits the bat and dribbles to the off-side

full_text: Rabada to N Thushara, no run, Rabada attempts the yorker, turns out to be a low full-toss - Thushara backs away and pushes it to the bowler

short_text: Rabada to Pathirana, Caught by Markram!! A tame chip and Sri Lanka have lost nine now - Rabada kept it full and followed
full_text: Rabada to Pathirana, Caught by Markram!! A tame chip and Sri Lanka have lost nine now - Rabada kept it full and followed Pathirana with the slower ball as he backed away, he's through with the flick early, the ball catches a big leading edge and Markram has a simple catch at mid-on. South Africa all over Sri Lanka at the moment.

short_text: Rabada to Pathirana, no run, on a good length and just outside off - Pathirana makes room, swings hard and connects with
full_text: Rabada to Pathirana, no run, on a good length and just outside off - Pathirana makes room, swings hard and connects with thin air

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, back of a length and angling away from the right-hander, Theekshana plays away from his body and is beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, , Baartman loses his line and slips one well down leg, past Theekshana's flick and is called as a wide

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, Baartman shortens the length outside off, extra bounce from a length and Theekshana is beaten on the back-foot block

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, , the leg-cutter and Theekshana is beaten, hits the deck and shapes away from Th
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, , the leg-cutter and Theekshana is beaten, hits the deck and shapes away from Theekshana's timid poke, beating him on the outside edge

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Theekshana, no run, fuller length delivery outside off, Theekshana backs away and finds mid-off with the drive

full_text: Nortje to Pathirana, no run, short of a good length and holding its line outside off - Pathirana backs away on the swipe and misses

full_text: Nortje to Pathirana, no run, on a good length and just outside off, Pathirana presses across and defends it to the off-side

short_text: Nortje to Mathews, Caught by Ottneil Baartman!! Nortje has  four now, he's enjoying these conditions to the hilt - bange
full_text: Nortje to Mathews, Caught by Ottneil Baartman!! Nortje has  four now, he's enjoying these conditions to the hilt - banged in short and at the right-hander, got big on Mathews and he was in no control on the pull, the ball lobs off the top-edge and Baartman is perfectly paced at long leg to gobble it up. Sri Lanka going nowhere at the moment.

short_text: Nortje to Mathews, no run, slower ball from Nortje, was the off-cutter, bowled from the back of the hand, it scoots low
full_text: Nortje to Mathews, no run, slower ball from Nortje, was the off-cutter, bowled from the back of the hand, it scoots low and past Mathews's swing, bounces through to the keeper

short_text: Nortje to Theekshana, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, Mathews prods forward and skews a thick inside edge, to the
full_text: Nortje to Theekshana, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, Mathews prods forward and skews a thick inside edge, to the right of mid-wicket who throws himself at the ball and makes a half stop

short_text: Nortje to Mathews, leg byes, 1 run, on a length and angling into the pads, Mathews was looking to flick and missed, brus
full_text: Nortje to Mathews, leg byes, 1 run, on a length and angling into the pads, Mathews was looking to flick and missed, brushed the thigh-pad and rolled towards square leg

short_text: Rabada to Theekshana, no run, nicely bowled, short and just outside off - it didn't rise as much as Theekshana expected,
full_text: Rabada to Theekshana, no run, nicely bowled, short and just outside off - it didn't rise as much as Theekshana expected, he's way too early to duck and doesn't watch the ball, which flies past his nose

full_text: Rabada to Theekshana, no run, short of a good length and at the stumps, defended back at the bowler

short_text: Rabada to Shanaka, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Full, fast and straight - Shanaka made things easy by backing away, has a wild s
full_text: Rabada to Shanaka, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Full, fast and straight - Shanaka made things easy by backing away, has a wild swing and misses, the ball crashes into the top of middle and Sri Lanka slip further, South Africa's bowlers making hay as the sun shines over New York.

full_text: Rabada to Shanaka, no run, back of a length and just outside off, dabbed with an angled bat to backward point

full_text: Rabada to Mathews, 1 run, on a good length and holding its length on off, Mathews was early into the flick and the big leading edge lobbed over backward point's head

short_text: Rabada to Mathews, , , fuller length delivery on off, Mathews stays leg-sided, opens up his hips and then shovels it ove
full_text: Rabada to Mathews, , , fuller length delivery on off, Mathews stays leg-sided, opens up his hips and then shovels it over the leg-side, went deep into the stands at mid-wicket

full_text: Marco Jansen to Shanaka, no run, Jansen shortens the length outside off - Shanaka hops across, plays with an open face and guides it to slip, on the bounce to the fielder

full_text: Marco Jansen to Shanaka, no run, fuller length delivery outside off, a hint of swing and Shanaka guides it to backward point

full_text: Marco Jansen to Shanaka, , , Shanaka getting lucky here, banged in short and he wassn't in a great position on the pull, but he went through with the shot and the edge flew over long leg for a

full_text: Marco Jansen to Shanaka, no run, short of a good length and at the stumps, defended back at the bowler

full_text: Marco Jansen to Mathews, 1 run, another short ball from Jansen, Mathews wasn't in a great position on the pull, but he did roll his wists over and pulled it down to long leg

full_text: Marco Jansen to Shanaka, 1 run, a top-edge and the ball drops in no man's land, banged in short from round the wicket - Shanaka tried to help it on its way with the pull, but he couldn't ride the bounce

full_text: Maharaj to Mathews, no run, drifting into middle and leg, Mathews works it to short midwicket

full_text: Maharaj to Mathews, , first six of the game as Mathews dances down and lofts it straight back. Good footwork to get close to the pitch before hitting through the line.

full_text: Maharaj to Mathews, no run, punched down the pitch off the back foot, and Maharaj makes a good stop

full_text: Maharaj to Mathews, no run, tossed up on middle, draws Mathews forward in defence and gets a bit of turn. Catches the outside half in defence

full_text: Nortje to Mathews, no run, length ball on off, Mathews hangs back and defends

full_text: Nortje to Mathews, no run, banged in short, Mathews looks to pull but is beaten as it goes over his left shoulder

full_text: Nortje to Asalanka, Caught by Reeza Hendricks!! Oh dear. Asalanka flicks a half-volley straight to deep square leg as Sri Lanka slip further. It's on the pads and he times it well, but doesn't keep it down. Goes straight to Reeza who accepts it with glee.

short_text: Nortje to Mathews, 1 run, back of a length on middle, clipped away through midwicket
full_text: Nortje to Mathews, 1 run, back of a length on middle, clipped away through midwicket

full_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, 2 runs, length ball outside off, Asalanka hangs back and dabs it very late past slip. It flying to the left of the fielder. But again, the it slows down on this outfield and Asalanka only gets a couple

short_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, no run, last thing they need is a run out now. Punched off the back foot wide of cover and, leading
full_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, no run, last thing they need is a run out now. Punched off the back foot wide of cover and, leading to Asalanka being sent back from halfway down the pitch. He dives back and makes it home before the keeper takes the bails off. Direct hit from Klaasen would've sent him packing

full_text: Maharaj to Mathews, 1 run, length ball outside off, Mathews cuts to deep point

full_text: Maharaj to Mathews, no run, tossed up on off, defended forward

full_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, 1 run, 86kph length ball on off, Asalanka sweeps behind square

short_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, no run, tossed up well outside off, Asalanka looks to work it through the on-side and gets a leadin
full_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, no run, tossed up well outside off, Asalanka looks to work it through the on-side and gets a leading edge to short cover

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, Caught by Tristan Stubbs!! Mendis takes on the short ball, and perishes. Short of length at the
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, Caught by Tristan Stubbs!! Mendis takes on the short ball, and perishes. Short of length at the body at 145kph, gets big on him and he miscues the pull in the air. Stubbs settles under it at deep square leg and makes no mistake. More trouble for Sri Lanka who are going absolutely nowhere.

short_text: Nortje to Asalanka, leg byes, 1 run, length ball straying down leg, Asalanka looks to clip it away but is struck on the
full_text: Nortje to Asalanka, leg byes, 1 run, length ball straying down leg, Asalanka looks to clip it away but is struck on the thigh

full_text: Nortje to Asalanka, no run, 143.8kph length ball on middle, Asalanka defends from the crease

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, Mendis walks across the stumps and might've been eyeing a scoop. But he gets a slower bal
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, Mendis walks across the stumps and might've been eyeing a scoop. But he gets a slower ball following him outside off. He adjusts and steers it to deep third

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, 2 runs, back of a length on middle, Mendis miscues the pull in the air but it lands safely in th
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, 2 runs, back of a length on middle, Mendis miscues the pull in the air but it lands safely in the midwicket region

full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, fiery yorker on middle, 144.7kph, and Mendis squeezes it out

full_text: Maharaj to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, back of a length on off, Mendis goes back and pulls to long-on

full_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, 1 run, tossed up outside off, Asalanka gets forward and pushes it through point

full_text: Maharaj to Asalanka, 2 runs, 78kph, tossed up on middle, Asalanka shuffles across and nudges it behind square

short_text: Maharaj to Samarawickrama, Bowled!! Two in two for Maharaj and Sri Lanka are in tatters here. Poor shot from Samarawickr
full_text: Maharaj to Samarawickrama, Bowled!! Two in two for Maharaj and Sri Lanka are in tatters here. Poor shot from Samarawickrama. He looks to cut a ball that's drifting in around off stump, doesn't have the width and it goes right through him. It wasn't short enough either.

short_text: Maharaj to Hasaranga, Stumped!! The experiment hasn't worked for Hasaranga as he gets stumped for a duck. Comes dancing
full_text: Maharaj to Hasaranga, Stumped!! The experiment hasn't worked for Hasaranga as he gets stumped for a duck. Comes dancing down for a big slog but is beaten in flight and gets nowhere close to the pitch of it. Has a big swing across the line and the ball turns past the outside edge, giving de Kock a simple opportunity.

short_text: Maharaj to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, tossed up and drifting in on middle, Mendis works it into the on-side
full_text: Maharaj to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, tossed up and drifting in on middle, Mendis works it into the on-side

short_text: Nortje to Hasaranga, no run, short of length on off, Hasaranga hops and fends it off
full_text: Nortje to Hasaranga, no run, short of length on off, Hasaranga hops and fends it off

short_text: Nortje to Kamindu Mendis, Caught by Reeza Hendricks!! Nortje, like Baartman, strikes in his first over as well. This is
full_text: Nortje to Kamindu Mendis, Caught by Reeza Hendricks!! Nortje, like Baartman, strikes in his first over as well. This is a good pick-up shot from Kamindu Mendis, but the square boundaries here are quite long. Full ball on the pads, he whips it in the air, times it well but doesn't get enough to clear the boundary. Actually, it's taken well inside the ropes by Reeza.

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, 148kph back of a length delivery into the body, Mendis is cramped for room as he goes for
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, 148kph back of a length delivery into the body, Mendis is cramped for room as he goes for the pull and miscues it in the air. It falls safely in the square leg region

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, short of length on off, Mendis walks across the stumps this time looking to pull. He get
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, short of length on off, Mendis walks across the stumps this time looking to pull. He gets inside the line, goes for it

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, another swing and miss! 142kph, short of length outside off, and it kicks up to beat Men
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, another swing and miss! 142kph, short of length outside off, and it kicks up to beat Mendis on the pull

short_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, short of length outside off, 144.8kph, Mendis swings and misses. Was looking to pull it
full_text: Nortje to Kusal Mendis, no run, short of length outside off, 144.8kph, Mendis swings and misses. Was looking to pull it really hard

short_text: Maharaj to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, back of a length on middle and leg, Mendis goes back to pull and miscues it in front of
full_text: Maharaj to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, back of a length on middle and leg, Mendis goes back to pull and miscues it in front of long-on. Wasn't short enough for him to execute it properly. Got it high on the bat

full_text: Maharaj to Kamindu Mendis, 1 run, 82.5kph length ball outside off, Kamindu Mendis makes room and cuts to deep point

full_text: Maharaj to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, length ball on middle and leg, it grips and straightens. Mendis hangs back and tucks it into the midwicket region

full_text: Maharaj to Kamindu Mendis, 1 run, tossed up on off, Kamindu Mendis dances down and knocks it to long-on

full_text: Maharaj to Kamindu Mendis, 2 runs, 83kph, tossed up outside off, Kamindu Mendis goes for a reverse-sweep and plays it well through backward point. Again, outfield isn't fast enough and the fielder gets across to cut it off

full_text: Maharaj to Kamindu Mendis, no run, tossed up outside off, length ball, Kamindu Mendis looks to cut and is beaten

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Kusal Mendis, 2 runs, fuller than a length around off, Mendis gives the charge, gets close to it and lifts it over extra cover. Hasn't timed it too well but manages to clear the infield

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Kusal Mendis, no run, , goes past the inside edge in defence and hits the back leg. There's an appea
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Kusal Mendis, no run, , goes past the inside edge in defence and hits the back leg. There's an appeal for LBW but height is probably the issue

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Kamindu Mendis, 1 run, full ball on off, Kamindu Mendis mistimes the drive to mid-off

full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Kamindu Mendis, no run, it continues to nip around. Fuller than a length on off, Kamindu Mendis doesn't move his feet as he looks to defend but it

full_text: Rabada to Kamindu Mendis, , this is a billiant pick-up shot! Full around middle and off, 138kph, angled into him and he whips it over square leg for his first boundary

full_text: Rabada to Kamindu Mendis, 1 run, low full toss outside off, driven wide of backward point who dives across and gets a hand on it

short_text: Ottneil Baartman to Nissanka, Caught by Klaasen!! Baartman strikes first ball as Nissanka falls in trying to break the s
full_text: Ottneil Baartman to Nissanka, Caught by Klaasen!! Baartman strikes first ball as Nissanka falls in trying to break the shackles. Fuller than a length outside off, he throws the bat at it, looking to slap it over the off-side. But there's a bit of extra bounce. It takes a thick edge and floats to deep third where Klaasen takes a simple catch.

short_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, no run, back of a length delivery just outside off, Mendis looks to dab late and . Goes on
full_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, no run, back of a length delivery just outside off, Mendis looks to dab late and . Goes on the bounce to the keeper

short_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, 2 runs, overpitched outside off, Mendis drives through cover but the outfield seems slow.
full_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, 2 runs, overpitched outside off, Mendis drives through cover but the outfield seems slow. Fielder chases it down

short_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, no run, 139.6kph, back of a length delivery angling away just outside off, Mendis looks to
full_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, no run, 139.6kph, back of a length delivery angling away just outside off, Mendis looks to dab it towards deep third but is beaten. It goes on the second bounce to de Kock, which is evidence of the variable nature of this surface

full_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, no run, 138.3kph, pitched up just outside off, Mendis drives firmly but straight to mid-off

full_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, 1 run, 139kph, pitched right up around off, and Nissanka hammers it straight to mid-off. Should've been a dot but there's a misfield, allowing him to take a single

full_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, no run, inswinging yorker on leg stump, Nissanka squeezes it out

full_text: Rabada to Kusal Mendis, no run, these are testing conditions to bat. Fuller than a length outside off, Mendis throws his hands on the drive but it nips away past the edge

full_text: Rabada to Kusal Mendis, , banged in short, Mendis ducks and it's called a wide for height

full_text: Rabada to Kusal Mendis, no run, as it comes back in a long way off the seam! Fuller than a length just outside off, Mendis is caught in the crease as he pokes at it but it bursts through him. He's saved by the bounce in this pitch

full_text: Rabada to Nissanka, 1 run, back of a length just outside off, Nissanka hops back and steers it to deep third

full_text: Rabada to Kusal Mendis, , short of length outside off, a bit of width and Mendis throws his hands at it. for the first boundary of this game. Rabada fell over in his followthrough there

short_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, no run, oh sharp bounce and by the angle! Back of a length across off, he's caught in the crea
full_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, no run, oh sharp bounce and by the angle! Back of a length across off, he's caught in the crease in defence and it flies past the bat shoulder to de Kock

short_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, no run, now this one goes on with the angle tothis time! Jansen has found his rhythm early. Ba
full_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, no run, now this one goes on with the angle tothis time! Jansen has found his rhythm early. Back of a length delivery in the channel, leaves Nissanka who looks to defend from the crease and goes past the edge

full_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, no run, but it's missing leg stump. Full delivery that bends in late, beating him on the flick shot

full_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, 1 run, fuller than a length on middle, Mendis swings across the line and whips it to long leg for a single

full_text: Marco Jansen to Kusal Mendis, no run, and hits Mendis on the glove as he defends on the back foot! Back of a length on off, climbs sharply and takes Mendis by surprise. Lucky it didn't pop up in the air

full_text: Marco Jansen to Nissanka, 1 run, fuller than a length on off, hint of inswing, Nissanka gets forward and knocks it wide of mid-off for a quick single. Good running there to get off the mark

short_text: Hasaranga to Miller, , Miller finishes it off. South Africa get off to a winning start. Hasaranga tries the offbreak but
full_text: Hasaranga to Miller, , Miller finishes it off. South Africa get off to a winning start. Hasaranga tries the offbreak but Miller is up for it, comes down the track and takes it on the full, drives it hard and wide of long-on

full_text: Hasaranga to Miller, no run, tossed up on the stumps, Miller makes room and for a moment he eyed the big hit, then pushes it back and Hasaranga dives to his right to make another excellent save

full_text: Hasaranga to Klaasen, , again too full and Klaasen belts it straight down the ground, makes room and thrashes it flat and straight, hit with so much power too

full_text: Hasaranga to Klaasen, , that's way too full and Klaasen feasts. Was tossed up outside the leg-stump, Klaasen gets forward and lofts miles over long-on, was in the hitting range and the pressure is released

full_text: Hasaranga to Klaasen, no run, length delivery on the stumps, punched to Hasaranga's left who gets across and cuts it off with a dive. Excellent stop

full_text: Hasaranga to Klaasen, no run, tossed up and turning away legbreak outside off, Klaasen punches and it's in the air for a while, but short of backward point

full_text: Hasaranga to Tristan Stubbs, Caught by Asalanka!! Superb catch at short cover. Was flighted outside off, Tristan Stubbs thrashed that but failed to keep it down, Asalanka bent down low and catches it with both hands. Made that look easy. Hasaranga is pumped and Sri Lanka have a slight opening here.

full_text: Pathirana to Klaasen, 1 run, , tailed in so late too at Klaasen's pads, has the South African on the floor but the thick inside-edge has run away to deep square leg. Pathirana was interested in an LBW appeal but it was clearly bat first

full_text: Hasaranga to de Kock, Caught&Bowled!! Chipped back. Such a soft dismissal. Was flighted outside off, de Kock just chips it back and that's a dolly for the bowler. Hasaranga takes it and punches the air in delight.

full_text: Mathews to Tristan Stubbs, 1 run, was there an inside edge? Given as a run and that'll go down as a half-chance, might've just bounced in front of the keeper - on a good length and well wide of off, Stubbs wafted lazily and the ball caught the bottom-edge - Kusal Mendis dived to his left, but can't stop it cleanly

full_text: N Thushara to Tristan Stubbs, leg byes, 2 runs, too straight from Thushara, on the pads and it's tucked away fine - Kusal Mendis gives the chase and keeps it down to a couple, given as leg byes

full_text: Shanaka to Tristan Stubbs, no run, , to the right of Mendis, it's a genuine edge and he's put it down. Sri Lanka can't afford to drop catches with the total they're defending - short of a good length and seaming away from off, Stubbs was rooted to the back-foot  as he pushed and the ball found the edge - Kusal Mendis dived to his right and failed to hold on

full_text: Shanaka to Tristan Stubbs, no run, short of a good length and just outside off, Stubbs stays back and defends it to the off-side

short_text: Shanaka to Tristan Stubbs, no run, has Stubbs been strangled down leg? Sri Lanka were confident, it's called as a wide,
full_text: Shanaka to Tristan Stubbs, no run, has Stubbs been strangled down leg? Sri Lanka were confident, it's called as a wide, but they . Looked like a deflection to the naked eye, but was it off the bat / pad? Looks like it's brushed the pad, onto UltraEdge and it confirms the same. So the wide call has to be changed and Sri Lanka lose a review. Short and angling down leg, Stubbs was looking to flick and missed

short_text: Shanaka to Markram, Caught by Kamindu Mendis!! Kamindu is claiming a catch at slip, Markram doesn't want to go, but he's
full_text: Shanaka to Markram, Caught by Kamindu Mendis!! Kamindu is claiming a catch at slip, Markram doesn't want to go, but he's sent on his way. Lovely delivery from Shanaka - angled in and then seamed away late, opens up Markram on the on-drive, he's through with the shot and the leading edge lobs towards slip - the ball was dying onto him, but Mendis dives to his right, gets both hands and holds on.

full_text: N Thushara to de Kock, no run, yorker length delivery on off, slings back into the left-hander who jams his bat down and squeezes it back at the bowler

full_text: N Thushara to Markram, , , tad too full and too wide form Thushara - Markram leans across, extends his fore-arm and then plays a classy cover-drive over cover, sent soaring into the stands for a maximum

full_text: Mathews to Markram, no run, that's a snorter, short of a good length and seaming away from off - Markram walked down the pitch and is undone by the bounce, the ball curving past the outside edge

short_text: N Thushara to Reeza Hendricks, Caught by Kamindu Mendis!! Edged and caught! Sri Lanka needed this wicket, on a good leng
full_text: N Thushara to Reeza Hendricks, Caught by Kamindu Mendis!! Edged and caught! Sri Lanka needed this wicket, on a good length and seaming away from wide of off, draws Hendricks into a poke, he does so without any conviction, the ball finds the edge and travels quickly to slip where Kamindu takes a well judged catch. can they make most of this early wicket?

full_text: N Thushara to de Kock, 1 run, fuller length delivery outside off - de Kock went hard on the drive and skews a thick inside edge, the ball rolling past the leg-stump for a single

full_text: N Thushara to de Kock, 2 runs, fuller length delivery on off, de Kock swings hard and drags a thick inside edge through mid-wicket - the fielder in the deep is square and they're back for the second
